title: arundina graminifolia var. chinensis
intro: Arundina graminifolia var. chinensis, also known as the Chinese orchid grass or Zhi Mu, is a plant species belonging to the Asparagaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Zhi Mu include its ability to promote digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and support immune function. In traditional Chinese medicine, Zhi Mu is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, or used in combination with other herbs in herbal preparations to treat various ailments.
